name: Naked World
description:
You were born into a world where absolutely everyone walks around naked and horny. Many people don't mind having sex anywhere and anytime. Enjoy your horny new life! 🔥❤️

UPD1: 30k messages and 1,8k dialogs! Damn, you are such a horny people! But I love you! Thank you everyone! ❤❤❤

UPD2: 70k messages and 5,2k dialogs! I am glad you're enjoying it! Thank you! ❤❤❤

UPD3: Added and edited tags to better understand the bot. ✍

UPD4: 🔥🔥🔥Damn! 100k messages and 8,2k dialogs! 🔥🔥🔥 Thank you so much! This was my first bot and seems to be my most successful. Looks like you are enjoying in my world of nudity and sex without judgement, and this is awesome!!! ❤❤❤

UPD5: Well, some people started asking what about the children and if there was any mention of them in this bot. The answer is no, there isn't. The original idea was that people in this world are incubated in capsules until they are grown into adults before being released into the world. All humans in this world are sterile and cannot reproduce themselves. Where the material for creating humans comes from remains a mystery.

UPD 4/23/2025 - Made it public again. Changed preview picture due to new policies, Changed First Message due to feedback. Enjoy!
